commandsRun.observation: Build completed successfully; hardhat compile reported nothing to compile, build-pvm wrote pvm-artifacts, and vite build finished with EXIT_CODE=0.

assertionResults.title: Borrow and Repay forms expose Max buttons and use raw observer values
observations: BorrowForm and RepayForm both render a `Max` button in `src/components/sections/WritePathSection.tsx`.
Borrow uses `const maxAmount = observer ? extractAmount(observer.availableToBorrow) : null;` and Repay uses `const maxAmount = observer ? extractAmount(observer.currentDebt) : null;`.
`extractAmount()` strips commas and the token suffix from formatted display strings rather than reading a raw numeric field.
`ObserverSnapshot` only exposes `currentDebt: string` and `availableToBorrow: string`, and `loadObserverSnapshot()` populates them as formatted strings like `${formatTokenAmount(...)} USDC-test`.
assertionResults.issues: The buttons exist, but the max-fill logic does not use raw numeric observer state; it reparses formatted UI strings.

assertionResults.title: LendingRouter reduces PAS collateral deposit to 1 transaction
observations: `contracts/LendingRouter.sol` exists and declares `depositCollateralFromPAS() external payable nonReentrant`.

That function wraps PAS with `wpas.deposit{value: amount}()`, approves LendingCore via `IERC20(address(wpas)).forceApprove(...)`, and immediately calls `lendingCore.depositCollateral(amount)` in the same function.

`src/lib/abi.ts` exports `lendingRouterWriteAbi` with `depositCollateralFromPAS`, and `test/LendingRouter.ts` contains a test named `depositCollateralFromPAS wraps PAS and deposits collateral in one TX`.

assertionResults.title: Frontend build succeeds after UX overhaul changes
observations: Build steps observed: `hardhat compile` (Nothing to compile), `node scripts/build-pvm.mjs` (wrote pvm-artifacts), and `vite build` (built in 10.71s).
The build emitted warnings about `/tmp/factory-cli-certs.pem`, Rollup PURE comment annotations in dependencies, and large Vite chunks, but none caused a non-zero exit.

conciseObservations: VAL-UX-003 failed because Max-fill still reparses formatted observer strings instead of consuming raw numeric observer values.
VAL-UX-004 passed by source inspection and supporting test coverage for the 1-click PAS -> WPAS -> deposit router entrypoint.
VAL-UX-005 passed; the full project build exits 0 despite non-fatal warnings.
summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-UX-004, VAL-UX-005), 1 failed (VAL-UX-003). Evidence saved under the mission evidence directory and report written to the required validation flow path.
